title: X-Vanilla
description: A Modpack that resembles the vanilla feel of minecraft
body:
# **Modpack Changelog – v1.0**

Overview:
This modpack enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience by adding client-side mods focused on performance, quality of life, and visual improvements, without altering gameplay mechanics or affecting server compatibility. Perfect for players who want smoother, cleaner, and more convenient gameplay while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.

**## Performance Enhancements:**

Optimized FPS and reduced lag using lightweight client-side performance mods.

Faster chunk loading and smoother world rendering.

Reduced stuttering and memory usage on low to mid-end PCs.

## **Quality of Life Improvements:**

Improved inventory management (sorting, searching, and quick crafting features).

Enhanced HUD and minimap options for better in-game information.

Keybind and UI tweaks for smoother controls and interactions.

### **Visual & Audio Enhancements:**

Subtle graphical improvements that preserve the vanilla look.

Optional shaders and lighting tweaks without heavy performance cost.

Minor sound and feedback adjustments for a more immersive experience.

### **Additional Notes:**

No gameplay-altering mods included; purely client-side.

Fully compatible with standard Minecraft servers.

Designed to feel like vanilla, but faster, cleaner, and more enjoyable.
